context: Germany's charts in 2000 reflected the Schlager revival and reality TV era. DJ Ötzi's novelty hit 'Anton aus Tirol' dominated the year, and Zlatko (a Big Brother contestant) achieved surprising chart success. Meanwhile, global hits from Bomfunk MC's, ATC, and Bon Jovi showed Germany's openness to international pop and dance music.

tracks.title: Around the World (La La La La La)
